label: Pi-Hub Cloud Bridge
info: Working Pi-Hub bridge. Configure tab env values from the Pi UI /integrations. HTTP nodes intentionally use method=use, url empty, authType empty so msg.url/msg.headers are honored.

name: Set these environment values on the tab/group before deploy
Use CLOUD_DEVICE_TOKEN from Pi-Hub /integrations — not factory/reset/revocation token
info: Do not enable the HTTP node's built-in Bearer Auth. This flow sets Authorization in msg.headers. If token is empty it will stop locally instead of spamming 401.

name: Build Cloud Event Request
Build Local Fallback Request
Set Default Strategy
Build Strategy Request
Store Strategy
Safety-net Command Poll (15m — wake channel is primary)
Build Command Poll
Execute Pump/MQTT Command
Build Command Result
Analytics payloads: weather_dwd, tibber_pulse, pump_guard, pump_control
info: Wire your existing Tibber/Weather/Pump metric nodes into Event In. Use component names weather_dwd, tibber_pulse, pump_guard, pump_control so cloud charts and AI reasoning can find them.
